Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5090 0 0}The title made it sound like this would be easy, but it sure doesn't feel easy to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}Working out is hard... And I didn't know it required so much thinking too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}You're right... If I rush, I'll only be making it harder on myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}But... Won't thinking less make it even more difficult?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5075 0 0}Honestly... I was thinking I might be able to provide better support if I knew more about physical exertion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Like, if I knew how to break a fall to minimize injury, I could direct everyone with that information in mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}But it turns out just moving your body isn't anywhere near as straightforward as I thought it would be.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}Of course it wouldn't be that easy... I'm so stupid...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5029 0 0}Yeah... If this isn't working, I'll just need to find something that will.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Now that I think about it... It's also possible that some knowledge might be useless right now, but could end up coming in handy later.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}I'll see what else I can come up with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5096 0 0}Of course! Everyone else is fighting their hardest, so I want to as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}You know... Sometimes, I hate that I get to just safely give support while everyone else fights on the front lines.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}But beating myself up about it isn't going to change anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5083 0 0}That's why I want to do anything I can, even if it only helps out a little.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense Fuuka-san's[n]unyielding determination...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}First, I think I'll try rewatching this video again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Oh, and please keep letting me know if you see my elbows start to bend, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
